message.content:
### 1. WORLD MAP DETAILS  
The world map in the hero area is a **dotted/dot-matrix style** with a **solid, glowing silhouette** of continents. It uses a **deep cyan-blue shade** (approximating `#00a8ff` or `#0099e6`), with bright, neon-blue dots (`#00d4ff`) marking key locations. The map has a **subtle glow effect** (intensity: medium) with a cyan-blue hue, creating a "digital network" aesthetic.  

- **Connection Lines**: Thin, semi-transparent white lines (`#ffffff`, opacity 0.3) link the glowing dots, forming a web of global connections. Lines are straight and evenly spaced, emphasizing intercontinental connectivity.  
- **Animated Pulse Dots**: Specific locations (e.g., North America, Europe, Asia, South America, Africa) have **pulsing cyan-blue dots** (intensity: soft, 1-second cycle). These dots expand slightly and fade in/out, drawing attention to major financial hubs.  
- **Background**: The map sits on a **dark navy-blue gradient** (from `#0a0e27` at the edges to `#141b3a` at the center), creating depth and making the map stand out.  


### 2. CURRENCY CARDS POSITIONED ON THE MAP  
Currency cards are **rounded rectangles** with a **dark gray background** (`#1e2532`), **1px solid white borders** (`#ffffff`), **12px border-radius**, and **8px padding**. Each card has a **soft shadow** (`#000000`, opacity 0.2) for depth.  

- **USD (Dólar Americano)**: Positioned at the **top-center** of the map, overlapping North America. Card content: 🇺🇸 (flag emoji), "USD" (bold, 14px, `#ffffff`), "Dólar Americano" (regular, 12px, `#a0a0a0`). Has a **cyan-blue glow** (intensity: low) when hovered.  
- **EUR (Euro)**: Top-left, overlapping Europe. Content: 🇪🇺, "EUR" (bold, 14px), "Euro" (regular, 12px). Same design as USD.  
- **BRL (Real Brasileiro)**: Center-left, overlapping South America. Content: 🇧🇷, "BRL" (bold), "Real Brasileiro" (regular).  
- **JPY (Yen Japonês)**: Top-right, overlapping East Asia. Content: 🇯🇵, "JPY" (bold), "Yen Japonês" (regular).  
- **NGN (Naira Nigeriana)**: Bottom-right, overlapping West Africa. Content: 🇳🇬, "NGN" (bold), "Naira Nigeriana" (regular).  

All cards are **centered vertically** on their respective continents and **horizontally aligned** to avoid overlapping map details.  


### 3. MAP BACKGROUND  
The map background has a **radial gradient** (from `#0a0e27` at the edges to `#141b3a` at the center), creating a "spotlight" effect that draws focus to the map. No grid lines or subtle patterns are present—only the gradient and map elements.  


### 4. PROPORTIONS  
- **Map Occupancy**: The map occupies **~70% of the right column’s height** (from the top of the hero section to the bottom of the currency cards) and **100% of the column’s width**.  
- **Aspect Ratio**: The map’s aspect ratio is **~1.5:1** (wider than tall), matching the column’s layout. The right column itself is ~40% of the hero section’s width, with the map taking up nearly all of that space.  


Every element is designed to emphasize global connectivity and financial infrastructure, with the map serving as the visual centerpiece of the hero area.
